prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约38889名→26243名→29212名→38119名→34716名，整体波动较大，2022年大幅前移后2024年明显后移，2025年有所回升至34716名；近5年位次均值约33436名，2025年基准位次为34716名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021年95人、2022年91人、2023年88人、2024年98人、2025年97人，2026年计划97人，与2025年持平；计划总量近年稳定在88–98人区间，未出现大幅扩缩招。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京师范大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第58名，近年稳定在52–61名区间，属于全国中上游水平；2025年高考周期声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及副院长师德师风事件；2026年周期延续明显负面评价，新增误挂旭日旗事件，累计5起负面事件；抖音热度总排名第69位（评价一般），综合热度约44.5万，未进入高热区间；无投档断档异常记录；第五轮学科评估中，教育学A、马克思主义理论A、地理学A、中国语言文学A-、外国语言文学A-，共5个A-/A级学科，师范类学科实力突出，对考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业热度2022年明显升温后2023–2024年回落至分化观望；法学热度基本稳定；计算机类2024年明显降温；新闻传播持续明显劝退；山东省2026年高考报名总人数约72万人，较2025年68.1万人增加约3.9万人（+5.7%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争；南京师范大学位于江苏省南京市，非山东省本地高校；该校在山东省招生占比约5%–6%（2025年山东招生97人，占全国总计划约5.6%），属于跨省招生中规模较大的省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次34716名、2026年招生计划持平、山东省考生规模明显增加（+5.7%）以及学校声誉连续两年负面等因素，预计2026年竞争略有加剧，位次小幅后移；预测最低录取位次约34916名，区间34416–35416名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约34916名，区间34416–35416名。建议位次在区间下限34416名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档专业（法学、中国语言文学类、英语师范）；位次在34916名附近的考生以二档专业为主（历史学、地理科学、计算机、电气等）；位次在区间上限35416名以外的考生以三档专业保底（教育技术学、生物工程、能源动力类等）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shandong Province comprehensive category were approximately 38889 → 26243 → 29212 → 38119 → 34716, showing significant fluctuations, with a large forward shift in 2022 followed by a notable backward shift in 2024, and a recovery to 34716 in 2025; the average ranking over the past 5 years is about 33436, with the 2025 baseline ranking at 34716; the enrollment plan for this university in Shandong Province comprehensive category was 95 in 2021, 91 in 2022, 88 in 2023, 98 in 2024, 97 in 2025, and 97 in 2026, unchanged from 2025; the total plan has been stable in the range of 88–98 in recent years, with no significant expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 58th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 52–61 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level nationwide; the reputation evaluation during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle was significantly negative, mainly involving a vice dean's teacher ethics incident; the 2026 cycle continues with significantly negative evaluations, with a new incident of mistakenly hanging the Rising Sun flag, totaling 5 negative incidents; Douyin popularity ranks 69th overall (average evaluation), with comprehensive popularity of about 445,000, not entering the high popularity range; no abnormal record of application gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Education A, Marxist Theory A, Geography A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Foreign Languages and Literature A-, totaling 5 A-/A level disciplines, with strong strength in teacher-training disciplines, which continue to attract candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of teacher-training/education majors significantly increased in 2022 but then declined to differentiation and wait-and-see in 2023–2024; law popularity is basically stable; computer science significantly cooled in 2024; journalism and communication continues to be significantly discouraged; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Shandong Province college entrance examination is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (+5.7%) compared to 681,000 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool; Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, not a local university in Shandong; the university's enrollment proportion in Shandong is about 5%–6% (97 enrolled in Shandong in 2025, accounting for about 5.6% of the national total plan), making it a relatively large province for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 34716, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase in the number of candidates in Shandong Province (+5.7%), and the consecutive two years of negative reputation, it is expected that competition will slightly intensify in 2026, with the ranking shifting slightly backward; the predicted minimum admission ranking is about 34916, with a range of 34416–35416.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 34916, with a range of 34416–35416. It is recommended that candidates with rankings below the lower limit of 34416 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, English Teacher Training); candidates with rankings near 34916 should mainly consider Tier 2 majors (History, Geography, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, etc.); candidates with rankings above the upper limit of 35416 should use Tier 3 majors as safety options (Educational Technology, Biological Engineering, Energy and Power, etc.).
